groupings.title: Local media pipeline
groupings.description: Generate images, voiceovers, music, sound effects, radio drama, and talking-head video entirely on-device — no cloud APIs.

groupings.title: 3D & web automation
groupings.description: Turn video into 3D Gaussian splats or printable 3D meshes, or teach the agent how a website works by recording sessions.

groupings.title: Documents
groupings.description: Read, edit, and create office documents locally — Word and PDF — while preserving formatting.

groupings.title: Agent cognition
groupings.description: Give the agent a persistent, inspectable mental workspace — a local J-space concept graph it can load, query by association, prime, and checkpoint.

groupings.title: Brand & design
groupings.description: Generate a logo and a matching, brand-consistent asset set — local-first: it prefers on-device rendering via the image-gen skill (FLUX.2 Klein on Apple Silicon) and only falls back to a cloud Gemini/OpenRouter key (auto-discovered from your environment or another installed skill, never bundled) when local can't run. Brand text is set from real fonts via wordmark.py, and --look presets steer the visual finish.
